title: Memoized Fibonacci (cache-aside)
prompt_md:
Implement `memoize_fib(n)` returning the nth Fibonacci number using an internal dict cache (the cache-aside idea: check the cache, compute on miss, store the result).

`fib(0) = 0`, `fib(1) = 1`, `fib(n) = fib(n-1) + fib(n-2)`.
hints: Use a dict as the cache. On each call, return the cached value if present; otherwise compute, store it, and return it.
Define a helper inside that recurses, or build the values iteratively into the cache dict.
